body.title: CLOSED: Honest Hebbian sleep pass — documented; SleepConsolidation is live
body.result: Path A: SleepConsolidation push source is the real D353 Hebbian pass (already live). Fixed 3 docstring locations in NE + consolidation.py. Design doc at lab/design_docs/_sleep_consolidation_design.md.
body.description:
narrative_engine._deep_consolidation_pass is documented as Hebbian wandering (D353). Actual implementation: k-means clustering (cosine >= 0.80 merge) + link pruning + orphan adoption. None of that is Hebbian. hebbian_bridge.py exists but is flag-gated off. This is an INVESTIGATE ticket with Path A bias: map the existing idle-pass behavior, confirm hebbian_bridge.py is the right home for the real mechanism, and produce a design for wiring replay-based Hebbian weight updates (for each within-turn node pair activated near each other, bump the interpretive edge weight). Path B (retract + rename) is the fallback if Path A scope proves too large.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/narrative_engine.py (_deep_consolidation_pass, line 2134), wild_igor/igor/cognition/hebbian_bridge.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/replay.py
**Design rules:** none-apply (investigation first)
**Scope boundary:** IN: read and map the idle pass; assess hebbian_bridge wiring; produce design doc for Path A. OUT: do not implement in this ticket.
**Test plan:** no tests — produces design doc.
**Pass condition:** Design doc at lab/design_docs/_sleep_consolidation_design.md names the chosen path (A or B), the specific wiring changes, and why.
